comment: Pattern Z Phase 2 seed. Each entry in slots[] becomes one lmstudio-bridge-* child of the orchestrator. The bridge receives LMSTUDIO_JID via env; when model is null the bridge auto-resolves via LM Studio's /v1/models. After Phase 3 ships the aggregator, hub-bus/participants.json takes over as the runtime source of truth (this file remains the committed default seed). UI changes via PUT /participants reconcile bridges through orchestrator's HTTP admin face. See PATTERN_Z_BUILD_PLAN_2026-05-13.md §3.2.
